description_long: This chaise features a sleek, modern design with a rectangular, black upholstered seat and a matching upright backrest at one end. The upholstery appears smooth and unadorned, giving it a minimalist and contemporary look. The frame and legs are constructed from a warm-toned wood, providing a sturdy base and a subtle contrast to the dark seat. The legs are straight and cylindrical, with a simple, functional design and no visible decorative elements. The chaise lacks armrests, emphasizing its streamlined silhouette and maximizing usable seating space. Its overall proportions suggest it is suitable for lounging in urban parks, public waiting areas, or modern outdoor patios.
description: A modern black upholstered chaise with a wooden frame and straight cylindrical legs, featuring a minimalist design and upright backrest. The seat is smooth and unpatterned, with no armrests.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the black seat and the upright backrest, with the wooden legs visible beneath.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the chaise's length, the thickness of the seat cushion, and the upright backrest at one end.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the backrest and the wooden support structure, with both rear legs visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the chaise's length and the absence of armrests.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is a simple, rectangular, upright panel upholstered in black material, with no visible curvature, segmentation, or decorative elements. It is of moderate height and appears to be firmly attached to the frame.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present on either side of the chaise.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are straight, cylindrical, and made of wood with a smooth finish. They are positioned at the corners and lack any decorative or ornate features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid black with a smooth, unpatterned surface and no visible tufting, quilting, or decorative stitching.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, large, attached seat cushion and an integrated backrest cushion, both of which are rectangular and seamlessly connected to the frame. No loose or additional cushions are visible.
